errors: [LDL-C exclusion uses `> 190 mg/dL` instead of `>= 190 mg/dL`; missing explicit CPG decision logic for 10-year CVD risk threshold (`>=10%` recommend statin, `7.5% to <10%` selectively offer statin); missing explicit combined inclusion logic showing age 40-75 AND at least 1 risk factor AND no exclusions before recommendation]
Value set for “Reason for not performing Chlamydia Screening” is unspecified/TBD in the ELM implementation, so the documented-refusal exclusion cannot be fully verified against the CPG requirements.

Missing required qualifying encounter criterion: the CPG requires age >= 12 **and** a qualifying encounter during the measurement period from the "Encounter to Screen for Depression" value set (`2.16.840.1.113883.3.600.1916`), but the ELM logic does not include any encounter-based inclusion check.

; The ELM logic for **Has Recent DEXA Scan** does **not require a result to be present**, but the CPG requires a DEXA scan within the past 2 years **with a result present**.; The ELM logic for **Has Osteoporotic Fracture** is not aligned with the CPG value-set exclusion logic because it checks only that `clinicalStatus` is not null, rather than explicitly using the osteoporotic fracture history criteria from the guideline.

Age threshold mismatch: CPG requires age >= 18 years, but ELM uses age >= 25 years. Time interval mismatch: CPG requires no blood pressure screening encounter within the past 12 months, but ELM uses a 6-month lookback.
Age upper threshold mismatch: CPG requires age <= 85 years, but ELM implements age <= 80 years.
[HbA1c threshold mismatch: CPG requires most recent HbA1c >= 6.5%, but ELM implementation uses >= 9 g%.]

ELM `Has Recent Pap Smear` checks only for an Observation in the Pap Test value set with `issued` within the past 3 years, but the CPG requires a Pap Test performed within the past 3 years **with a result present**. The result-present requirement is missing from the ELM logic.

[Smoking history criteria mismatch: CPG requires active smoker or former smoker with at least 20 pack-years who quit within the past 15 years, but ELM only checks for Tobacco User Condition with clinicalStatus = active and does not verify former smoker status, 20 pack-years, or quit-within-15-years; therefore the inclusion logic is incomplete and does not correctly implement the CPG decision logic.]

Age threshold mismatch: CPG requires age 45-75 years, but ELM uses age 60-75 years. Time interval mismatch: CPG requires no colorectal cancer screening within the past 1 year, but ELM uses a 2-year lookback.

ELM uses a 6-month lookback for recent anxiety screening, but the CPG requires screening within the past 1 year. Also, the ELM rationale is null when screening is needed, but the CPG specifies a non-null rationale message when InPopulation = true.

Age threshold mismatch: CPG requires inclusion age 15 to 65 years, but ELM uses age >= 30 years. Logic mismatch: CPG says no screening is needed only if an HIV screening test with a result present was performed within the past 1 year; ELM checks only for an Observation issued within 1 year with non-null value, which is not the same as a screening test with result present. Rationale mismatch: CPG specifies a non-null screening rationale when screening is needed, but ELM returns null.

BMI threshold mismatch: ELM uses BMI >= 35 kg/m2 for Is Obese, but CPG requires BMI >= 25 kg/m2; lookback period mismatch: ELM uses blood glucose/HbA1c test within past 1 year, but CPG requires within past 3 years; rationale mismatch: CPG specifies a non-null rationale when screening is needed, but ELM implementation sets rationale to null.

Age lower bound mismatch: CPG requires age >= 21 years, but ELM uses age >= 30 years in "In Demographic". Also, the CPG says no screening is needed only if a Pap Test has been performed within the past 3 years with a result present, but the ELM "Has Recent Pap Smear" logic checks only for an Observation issued within 3 years and does not explicitly require a result present.
[Time interval mismatch: CPG requires no depression screening within the past 1 year, but ELM uses a 3-month lookback for both adult and adolescent depression screening.]
Age threshold mismatch: CPG requires age >= 65 years, but ELM uses age >= 75 years in “In Demographic”.
Age threshold mismatch: CPG requires age >= 18 years, but ELM uses age >= 25 years in “In Demographic”.

[DEXA lookback period mismatch: CPG requires no DEXA scan performed within the past 2 years, but ELM uses 6 months; Osteoporotic fracture exclusion logic mismatch: CPG excludes any history of osteoporotic fractures, but ELM checks only for any Condition with non-null clinicalStatus rather than matching the osteoporotic fracture value set and history criteria; DEXA result-present requirement is not explicitly represented in the ELM logic]
Age lower bound mismatch: CPG requires age 65 to 75 years, but the ELM implementation uses age >= 55 and <= 75.

[Logical mismatch: CPG requires ALL criteria with AND — age >= 40 AND female AND no mammogram in past 1 year — but ELM defines MeetsInclusionCriteria as ([Screening Age] OR [Gender]) AND [Mammogram], incorrectly using OR between age and gender.]

ELM `Needs Tobacco Use Screening` only checks age >= 18 and does not include the required exclusion of having a tobacco use screening performed within the past 1 year with a result present. The CPG requires `Age >= 18 AND No tobacco use screening performed in the past 1 year`; the ELM `InPopulation` logic therefore does not correctly implement the guideline decision logic.

; Age logic mismatch: CPG requires age **50 to 80 years inclusive**, but ELM only checks **age >= 50** and does not enforce the **<= 80** upper bound.; Smoking history logic mismatch: CPG requires an **active smoker or former smoker** from the **Tobacco User** value set with **at least 20 pack-years** and, if former smoker, **quit within the past 15 years**. ELM instead checks for a **Condition** in the Tobacco User value set with **clinicalStatus = active**, which does not implement the required smoking history criteria.; Value/criteria mismatch: ELM does not include the required **20 pack-year** threshold or the **quit within past 15 years** requirement.; Logical structure mismatch: CPG inclusion requires **age AND smoking history AND no LDCT within 1 year**; ELM’s smoking component is not equivalent to the CPG’s inclusion criteria.

The Connective Tissue Disorders exclusion logic is inverted in the ELM implementation. The CPG requires exclusion when the patient **has** a confirmed active connective tissue disorder, but the ELM defines `Connective Tissue Disorders (SNOMED)` as `NOT (EXISTS (ActiveCondition(Confirmed(...))))`, which is true when **no** CTD is present. As a result, `MeetsExclusionCriteria = [Connective Tissue Disorders] OR [Amiodarones]` incorrectly excludes patients without CTD and fails to exclude patients with CTD.

[ELM implementation omits the required male sex criterion from the inclusion logic: CPG requires Age 65-75 AND Male AND Ever smoked AND No prior AAA ultrasound, but "Needs AAA Screening" only checks In Demographic, Has Smoking History, and NOT Has Prior AAA Screening. Also, the smoking history criterion is implemented via Condition retrieve with clinicalStatus active/resolved rather than directly representing the CPG's "ever smoked (100+ cigarettes in lifetime)" Tobacco User value set, which may not exactly match the required value set semantics.]

Missing required exclusion for active Bipolar Disorder in the ELM decision logic; the CPG requires NOT having an active bipolar diagnosis, but the implementation only checks depression diagnosis and recent screening. Also, the qualifying encounter requirement from the CPG ("Encounter to Screen for Depression" during the measurement period) is not represented in the ELM logic.

[Logical mismatch: the CPG requires age >= 50 AND NO colonoscopy in the past 1 month (count = 0), but the ELM defines Colonoscopy as COUNT(ProcedureLookBack(..., 1 month)) > 0 and then uses [Required Age] AND [Colonoscopy], which makes InPopulation true when a colonoscopy exists. The inclusion/exclusion logic is inverted relative to the CPG.]

ELM logic is inverted relative to the CPG: the CPG requires Age >= 65 AND NO falls risk assessment in the past 1 year, but the ELM defines "Needs Falls Prevention Screening" as Age >= 65 AND HAS Recent Falls Assessment. The NOT operator is missing on the recent assessment criterion, causing screening to be triggered for patients who already had a recent assessment and not triggered for those who need screening. Numeric values and value set reference match the CPG.

[Missing qualifying encounter criterion from the CPG (Encounter to Screen for Depression value set 2.16.840.1.113883.3.600.1916); Needs Depression Screening uses `NOT ([Has Bipolar Diagnosis] AND [Has Depression Diagnosis])` instead of requiring both exclusions independently (`NOT Has Bipolar Diagnosis AND NOT Has Depression Diagnosis`), which allows patients with only one active diagnosis to incorrectly remain in population]
[MeetsExclusionCriteria is implemented as Connective Tissue Disorders AND Amiodarones, but the CPG requires Connective Tissue Disorders OR Amiodarone; therefore the exclusion logic is incorrect.]

Value set mismatch: CPG requires “Fall Risk Assessment” value set `2.16.840.1.113883.3.464.1003.118.12.1028`, but the ELM implementation uses `2.16.840.1.113883.3.600.564`. Age threshold (65 years) and lookback interval (1 year) match exactly, and the logical structure is otherwise consistent.
Value set mismatch: CPG requires Alcohol Use Screening value set `2.16.840.1.113883.3.600.1542`, but ELM uses `2.16.840.1.113883.3.526.3.1278`.
